stemHtml: When an aircraft under unlawful interference must deviate from its assigned track or level without being able to contact ATS, what should the PIC do whenever possible?

options.a: Follow procedures established in the Regional Supplementary Procedures (Doc 7030).
options.c: Fly at a level differing by 250 ft where a 1000 ft VSM applies.
options.d: Fly at a level differing by 500 ft where a 2000 ft VSM applies.
